title: Palladium feature common fragments
description: Shared JSON Schema fragments for magic, psionic, talent, and other Feature composer catalog rows. Referenced via `$ref` from domain schemas (e.g. `resolutionTable`, `materialRequirements`, `forgedItemOutput`, `spawnedPresence`, `formTransformation`).

percentileRange.description: Inclusive d100 band (01 = 1, 00 = 100). Matches morphus `percentileRange` convention.

min.description: Inclusive low bound on a d100 (01 = 1).

max.description: Inclusive high bound on a d100 (00 = 100).

resolutionTableEntry.description: One outcome band in a percentile or dice resolution table. Provide structured `percentile` for machine resolution or legacy `rollRange` prose for authoring.

rollRange.description: Authoring shorthand for an outcome band (e.g. `01-20`, `77-00`).

label.description: Short outcome label shown in UI (e.g. On target, Off course).

effect.description: Mechanical or narrative outcome when the roll falls within the band.

resolutionTrigger.description: When a resolution table is rolled relative to the spell or power lifecycle.

when.description: `per_melee_round` — roll each melee round while the effect persists (e.g. cumulative escape hazard).

rollKind.description: Dice used when `when` fires; may duplicate table-level `rollKind`.

resolutionTable.description: Percentile or dice outcome bands mapped to mechanical effects (e.g. Teleport arrival accuracy, Exorcism sub-outcomes).

rollKind.description: Primary dice for table resolution when not implied by `resolutionTrigger`.

label.description: Table heading shown at cast or resolution time.

catalogEntityRef.description: Reference to a race/NPC catalog row (`palladium-race.schema.json`, typically `raceAudience: npc`).

catalogItemRef.description: Reference to an equipment/loot catalog row (future `palladium-item.schema.json`).

catalogItemId.description: Canonical item id from `content/items/*.json` when the loot catalog exists.

quantitySpec.description: Structured amount for material components, forged item counts, or charges.

formula.description: Palladium dice or prose formula when `kind` is `formula` or `per_level`.

materialComponentEntry.description: One physical inventory or prose reagent required to cast or complete a ritual.

label.description: Display label when no catalog row exists yet.

unit.description: Inventory unit for the reagent. `item`, `kit`, and `pouch` cover prose ritual components without a catalog row.

consumption.description: `destroyed` deducts from inventory on success; `reusable_tool` must be present but is not consumed.

materialRequirements.description: Physical components consumed or required present for casting (distinct from `ppe` and `permanentCosts`).

label.description: Checklist heading shown before cast or ritual start.

allRequired.description: When true (default), every entry must be satisfied; when false, GM adjudicates partial sets.

forgedItemOutput.description: Persistent equippable item created by enchanting or scroll/scribing rituals.

catalogItemId.description: Loot/equipment catalog row cloned into inventory on success.

outputTemplateId.description: Lightweight template when no catalog row exists yet.

label.description: Display name when forging from a template only.

initialPresence.description: Inventory presence state when the item is created.

bindToCaster.description: When true, only the caster (or designated owner) can use the item.

encodedSpellId.description: For scrolls and similar items — spell invoked when the item is used.

permanentPoolReduction.description: Irreversible reduction applied to a maximum pool or attribute.

value.description: Fixed amount subtracted from the maximum when `kind` is `fixed`.

formula.description: Palladium dice or attribute formula when `kind` is `formula` (e.g. `2D6`, `PE`).

permanentCostEntry.description: One permanent sacrifice applied when the feature succeeds (distinct from activation economy).

resource.description: Maximum pool or attribute permanently reduced.

spawnedPresenceConstructStatModifiers.description: Physical attributes of a spawned construct (e.g. Ectoplasm entity P.S., P.P., Spd.).

spawnedPresenceConstructMovement.description: Movement capabilities of a spawned construct.

spawnedPresenceConstructCombatModifiers.description: Flat integer strike/parry/dodge penalties or bonuses specific to the construct.

spawnedPresenceConstruct.description: Targetable magical construct with its own ablative health pool, distinct from catalog creatures.

name.description: Construct label (e.g. Magic Net, Energy Field).

derivedHealth.description: Construct S.D.C. pool formula (e.g. `60 S.D.C.`, `20 S.D.C. per level of experience`).

notes.description: Behavior or lore not captured in catalog stats (e.g. alien intelligence, loyalty rules).

spawnedPresenceCreatureControl.description: Control or obedience save for a summoned catalog creature.

spawnedPresenceCreatureDuration.description: How long summoned creatures remain under the caster's influence.

spawnedPresenceCreature.description: True creature summoning from the race/NPC catalog (full stat block loaded from `catalogRaceId`).

countFormula.description: Dice or scaling formula for how many creatures appear (e.g. `1D6`).

notes.description: Summoned creature behavior not implied by the catalog race (e.g. permanent loyalty, command wording).

spawnedPresence.description: Physical construct or catalog creature spawned by a spell or power.

formTransformation.description: Full or partial character sheet replacement while the feature is active (distinct from `grantedModifiers` overlay buffs).

mode.description: `sheet_replacement` swaps the active stat block; `facade_overlay` applies only when casting from Facade.

targetCatalogRaceId.description: Bestiary or race row whose stat block replaces the caster's form.

targetTemplateId.description: Lightweight transformation template when no single catalog race applies (e.g. Mist form).

masksCharacterSheet.description: When true, the original sheet is hidden behind the transformed form until the effect ends.

preservedAspects.description: Caster aspects that persist through transformation (e.g. mind, alignment, ppe_pool).
